notes: Phase 2 D-09 truth case: 2008 Global Financial Crisis scenario validation. Pins forceEngine to traditional via NODE_ENV=test (RESEARCH Pitfall #1: streaming engine patches Math.random globally and is non-deterministic) and uses randomSeed 12345 for determinism. Snapshot-locked on first green run with the Plan 02-02 option (a) failureRate translation (irr.mean scaled by 1 - failureRate). Tolerances are 4 decimals (RESEARCH Q12 recommendation). Re-locking these numbers requires re-running this test with the SNAPSHOT_CAPTURE block re-enabled (see backtesting-scenario.test.ts).
